history.reason: Phase A+B artifacts complete: spec.md / design.md / data-schema.json / c4.json / sequence.json / idef0.json / grafcet.json. L1+L2 scoped. D-7 resume + Live Recurrence Evidence section recorded in proposal.md.

Phase planned artifacts complete: tasks.md (Phase 1+2+3 split per DD-4, ~28 tasks), handoff.md (Execution Contract / 16 Required Reads / 10 Stop Gates / Code-vs-Docs split per feedback_commit_all_split_code_docs.md), test-vectors.json (11 vectors covering A1-A6 + cross-DD invariant), errors.md (5 REC- codes catalogued — REC-001..005, all non-throwing per spec invariant; REC-004 is the regression watchdog for DD-2), observability.md (M8/M9/M10/M11 metrics + 5 alert recommendations + cache-equilibrium.jsonl new channel)

Phase 1 (DD-2 + DD-3 + DD-5) implementation complete on beta/fix-empty-response-rca: tasks 1.1-1.13 + smoke 1.14; 117/117 tests pass (107 baseline + 10 DD-3 readEmptyTurnClassification tests; sse.test wsErrorReason boundary regression block extended). Phase 2 (DD-1 compaction) deferred until Phase 1 soaks per SG-10.
